reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención! Un poco complicado entrar por las obras del vial pero con todo que tiene una estación YPF ACA de las clásicas

(Translated by Google)
Very good service! A little tricky to get in due to road construction, but it still has a classic YPF station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoalltQW9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención en el bar, carisimo, mal educada la señora que tiene la concesión del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service at the bar, extremely expensive, and the lady who runs the ACA concession was rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNVltVGh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
No andaba la aplicacion ypf.y no tenia promos de cafe como en las otras estaciones ypf.
Ni tenia facturas.
Es la entrada al hotel de aca...combustible bien.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF app wasn't working, and they didn't have coffee promotions like the other YPF stations.
They didn't have receipts either.
It's the entrance to the hotel here... fuel is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoanJ5NjRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un lugar para almorzar muy bien mientras el restaurante se encuentra abierto (hasta las 14hs, creo) hacen descuento a socios ACA. Atención excelente y linda vista al campo. Muy recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
A great place to have lunch while the restaurant is open (until 2 p.m., I believe). They offer a discount for ACA members. Excellent service and a beautiful view of the countryside. Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobG9EQTB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena relación precio calidad en las habitaciones, muy buena oferta y atención en el restaurante, platos abundantes, aunque algo elevados los precios de la carta! ( no había menú infantil)

(Translated by Google)
Good value for money in the rooms, very good service and food in the restaurant, generous dishes, although the menu prices were a bit high! (There was no children's menu.)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoNHEtZ1ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve de paso en nuestro viaje a Las Grutas. el lugar esta precioso.  muy limpio y comodo.  la atencion de la señora encargada fue magnifica.   el restaurante a todo lujo, con platos riquisimos y precios acorde a la realidad.  totalmente recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I was passing through on our trip to Las Grutas. The place is beautiful, very clean and comfortable. The service from the lady in charge was magnificent. The restaurant is luxurious, with delicious dishes and reasonable prices. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNob3FXckNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Carisimo el resto asi que lo basico nomas y seguir adelante

(Translated by Google)
The rest is very expensive, so just get the basics and move on.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoM0pxbGVREAE

reviews.comment:
Me encantó, ideal para hacer una parada de camino al sur o viniendo del sur para CABA. Además tienen una hosteria, para poder pasar la noche y continuar viaje. Las chicas que atendían fueron muy amables, la verdad oara destacar.

(Translated by Google)
I loved it. It's perfect for a stopover on the way south or coming from the south to Buenos Aires. They also have a hostel, so you can spend the night before continuing your trip. The staff were very friendly, truly something to write home about.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoeUtQSnRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
No voy mas!!! Un solo playero y al parecer no tiene ganas de trabajar, una atencion de m¥€rda

(Translated by Google)
I'm never going back!!! There was only one attendant and he didn't seem to want to work, the service was awful.
